summary: Verified two Design Requests UI changes: (A) Work Versions card side-by-side layout with h-11 taller buttons on the left and file preview on the right — passes; and (B) URL validation on Social Media / File Links in the New Design Request form — passes (inline red error text, red border, submission blocked with correct toast, error clears on valid URL).

issues: React warning in console: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' when rendering the Work Versions card children. Non-blocking but should be fixed in DesignRequestNewDetail.js by adding stable `key` props to whichever list is currently using array indexes or missing keys around lines 875-940.

action_items: IMPORTANT SPEC vs CODE MISMATCH — The review request said the LinkListField uses testPrefix 'social-links' and 'file-links' (i.e. data-testids like social-links-input-0, file-links-error-0, file-links-add). The actual code in /app/frontend/src/pages/NewDesignRequestNew.js lines 556 & 565 uses testPrefix 'mr-social' and 'mr-filelink' (data-testids: mr-social-input-0, mr-social-error-0, mr-social-add, mr-filelink-input-0, mr-filelink-error-0, mr-filelink-add). Functionality is fully working, but if any downstream test relies on the spec'd testids they will break. Decide whether to rename testPrefix to 'social-links' / 'file-links' or update the spec.
Fix React key warning in Work Versions section of DesignRequestNewDetail.js (~lines 875-940) — cosmetic console noise.
critical_code_review_comments: isValidUrl helper (NewDesignRequestNew.js line 39-48) correctly rejects protocol-relative and bare tokens; empty rows are permitted and stripped on submit — good.

handleSubmit order (line 254-257): canSubmit fires first ('Please fill all required fields'), then badLinks check. Because the Submit Request button is disabled when canSubmit is false, users won't see the required-fields toast by clicking submit (button is disabled) — the link validation therefore only surfaces once all required fields are filled. That is the intended behaviour and matches the reviewer's context note.
Work Versions layout uses flex-col sm:flex-row with actions column sm:w-56 shrink-0 on the left and files flex-1 min-w-0 on the right — clean, responsive, and the buttons are h-11 as required.
Version buttons remain full-width inside the actions column (w-full) so they stretch nicely; Delete button is amber/red bordered — good visual hierarchy.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing MR-2026-0006 (id 537081ec-e022-4d26-a39c-25045cf2e6ee) which already has 1 work version (V1) with a chosen state that was toggled and restored during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For the New Design Request form (/design-requests-new/new), link field data-testids are prefixed 'mr-social' and 'mr-filelink' (NOT 'social-links' / 'file-links' as some specs state). Add-link buttons: mr-social-add, mr-filelink-add. Error paragraphs: mr-social-error-0, mr-filelink-error-0. Inputs: mr-social-input-0, mr-filelink-input-0. Submit Request button remains disabled until request_type + department + due date + requirement_details are populated; the link-validation toast is only reachable after all required fields are filled.
